channel.title: NeuralSDR2 Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
NeuralSDR2 v1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • RTL-SDR device support with real-time spectrum display
  • AM, NFM, WFM, USB, LSB, CW demodulation
  • Waterfall display with frequency markers
  • Satellite tracking with 3D globe
  • ADS-B aircraft tracking
  • Weather radar overlay
  • Multi-theme UI (Vintage, Modern, Military)
